message:
🐛 Fix INVENTORY.md consistency issues (#410)

- Fix card type names: ai_* → console_ai_* (matches cardRegistry.ts)
- Fix ResourceDetailModal path: dashboard/ → clusters/ResourceDetailModals.tsx
- Fix ApiKeyPromptModal path: cards/AIMissions.tsx → cards/console-missions/shared.tsx
- Remove obsolete AIMissions drill-down entry (MissionDrillDown doesn't exist)

Fixes #282, #283, #284

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
